blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 18" over the past week. Current depth: 9".
